agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Introducing a bulky aromatic residue at position 5 and a hydrophobic residue at

report.hypothesis: Introducing a bulky aromatic residue at position 5 and a hydrophobic residue at position 11 will enhance SSTR2-specific complementarity with ECL2/ECL3 and TM5/TM6, while minimizing off-target interactions. This should increase the selectivity margin by differentiating SSTR2 from SSTR3/SSTR5.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current design strategy is generating structurally suboptimal candidates and

report.hypothesis: The current design strategy is generating structurally suboptimal candidates and not sufficiently disrupting off-target interactions. Tighter structural constraints and targeted mutagenesis at non-pharmacophore positions are needed to improve both structural quality and selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Structural failures suggest excessive clashes in the binding pocket. Reducing the clash threshold will enforce better geometry and reduce structural artifacts.
To improve selectivity, we must disrupt conserved interactions at non-pharmacophore positions (1, 2, 5, 6, 11, 12) that are likely driving off-target binding to SSTR3/SSTR5.
